faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Upload a product photo, pick a pose or scene from the template library, and AI produces a professional on-model lifestyle shot in 5–15 seconds. No photographer, no studio, no prompt engineering.
faq.a2: We cover three categories: apparel (ghost mannequin, flat-lay, or worn — 22 pose templates shipped), cosmetics and beauty (skincare, makeup, haircare scenes), and jewelry (rings, earrings, necklaces, bracelets). A regular smartphone photo is enough — AI isolates the product automatically.
faq.q3: Do I need a professional camera?
faq.a3: No. Luminify works with plain phone flat-lays and ghost-mannequin shots. The AI preserves the product and places it in a styled lifestyle scene that looks shot on a real set.
faq.a4: 3 free shots on signup — no credit card needed. Paid plans: Starter — $1/mo (10 shots), Pro — $10/mo (100 shots), Business — $25/mo (250 shots). For spiky months, top-up packs ($4 / $15 / $35) add credits without upgrading plans. Cancel anytime.
faq.q5: Where can I publish the images?
faq.a5: Outputs are sized for Shopify product pages, Amazon, Etsy, TikTok Shop, Instagram, Meta and Google ad creatives, email campaigns, and lookbooks. High-resolution downloads.
faq.a6: One image takes 5–15 seconds. Batch runs scale linearly — a catalog refresh typically ships the same day.

faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about Luminify: how the service works, which products are supported, pricing, and where to use the generated images.
faqPage.heroTitle: Answers to the most common questions about Luminify
faqPage.heroSubtitle: We pulled together the most important questions about generation, pricing, source image quality, and practical use cases in one place.
faqPage.sectionDescription: If you are just getting to know the service, start here. These are the most useful product questions answered clearly and briefly.

contactsPage.managerBody: We can help with product questions, choosing a plan, and finding the best workflow for your store.
contactsPage.responseBody: Product support, billing questions, team onboarding, help with image generation, and workflow recommendations.
contactsPage.locationBody: Luminify operates from Astana, Kazakhstan and helps e-commerce teams prepare visual content for catalogs and marketplaces.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Luminify is being built by Nuray Sagatbek, a solo founder based in Astana. Learn more about the project, the mission, and the person behind the product.
aboutPage.heroTitle: Luminify is an independent product built for e-commerce teams
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: I am building this service as a solo founder to help stores create strong visual content for catalogs and marketplaces faster and at a lower cost.
aboutPage.storyBody1: My name is Nuray Sagatbek. I am building Luminify as a solo founder around one clear goal: helping stores create better visual content without expensive photoshoots, heavy production processes, or unnecessary manual work.
aboutPage.storyBody2: I want the product to stay practical: upload a product photo, get a clean result, and use it right away in a catalog, product page, or ad. That is why I focus not only on AI capabilities, but also on a workflow that feels genuinely useful every day.
aboutPage.founderNote: If the product resonates with you, or if you want to discuss collaboration, integration, or using the service in your store, feel free to reach out directly.
aboutPage.missionBody: Make high-quality visual content more accessible to small and midsize e-commerce businesses so sellers can grow faster without relying on expensive photoshoots for every new product.

allInOne.title: Your AI content studio for every SKU
allInOne.description: From a flat-lay on your phone to on-model lifestyle ready for Shopify, Amazon, and Instagram. Background removal, pose templates, ad-ready outputs — in one workflow.
allInOne.feature2: Curated pose templates — apparel, beauty, jewelry

costSavings.title: Replace the $500+ photoshoot
costSavings.description: A US on-model photoshoot runs $500–$5,000 per session and takes 2–4 weeks to book. With Luminify, your next drop is catalog-ready in minutes — starting at $1.

categories.title: Purpose-built for apparel, beauty, and jewelry
categories.subtitle: Most AI photo tools force apparel brands to stitch two or three services together. Luminify ships curated pose libraries and scene templates for each category — in one workflow.
categories.apparelDesc: Turn ghost-mannequin and flat-lay shots into on-model lifestyle imagery. 22 pose templates covering streetwear, basics, outerwear, and accessories.
categories.cosmeticsDesc: Create consistent brand-mood scenes across shade variants. Skincare, makeup, and haircare — shot like a premium campaign, without the studio.
categories.jewelryDesc: Rings, earrings, necklaces, and bracelets — placed on models or styled in luxurious scenes. The category where Luminify first launched.
categories.jewelryBullet1: On-model placement for rings, earrings, chains

apparel.metaTitle: AI clothing photography for apparel brands
apparel.metaDescription: Turn ghost-mannequin and flat-lay shots into on-model lifestyle photos in seconds. Built for Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop apparel sellers.
apparel.heroTitle: On-model apparel photos without booking a studio
apparel.heroSubtitle: Upload a ghost-mannequin or flat-lay shot. Pick a pose template. Get a campaign-ready on-model image — in 5 seconds, for less than a coffee.
apparel.problemBullet1: A studio day costs $500–$2,000 per SKU set
apparel.problemBullet2: Models, MUAs, and locations book out 2–3 weeks ahead
apparel.problemBullet3: Marketplaces demand fresh creative every drop
apparel.problemBullet4: Generic AI tools can't handle drape, fit, or fabric
apparel.featuresTitle: Built around how apparel brands actually work
apparel.featuresSubtitle: Every feature shipped with input from real DTC fashion teams.
apparel.feature1Desc: Upload your packshot. Luminify infers the silhouette and dresses a generated model in your garment, preserving fabric and color.
apparel.feature2Desc: Streetwear, basics, outerwear, swim, accessories. Each template is hand-tuned for fit accuracy and natural posture.
apparel.feature3Desc: 1:1 for Amazon, 4:5 for Instagram, 9:16 for TikTok Shop and Reels — exported in one click.
apparel.feature4Desc: Same model, same pose, different colorways. Build a SKU set that looks like a real campaign.
apparel.useCase1: PDP hero images for new drops
apparel.useCase3: Lookbook scenes for email and editorial
apparel.faq1Q: Will Luminify preserve my garment exactly?
apparel.faq1A: Yes — your packshot drives the result. Color, fabric pattern, neckline, and silhouette are preserved; only the model and scene are generated.
apparel.faq2Q: Can I get the same pose across colorways?
apparel.faq2A: Yes. Pick one pose template, upload each colorway, and Luminify keeps the model and pose consistent across the SKU set.
apparel.faq3Q: Does it work for ghost-mannequin photos?
apparel.faq3A: That's the primary input we optimized for. Ghost-mannequin and flat-lay both work — flat-lay just needs a clean background.
apparel.faq4Q: What about plus-size, kids, or menswear?
apparel.faq4A: All three are supported via pose templates. Womenswear has the deepest library today; menswear and kids are expanding monthly.
apparel.ctaTitle: Ready to ship apparel content faster?
apparel.ctaSub: 3 free generations on signup. No credit card.

cosmetics.metaTitle: AI cosmetics photography for beauty brands
cosmetics.metaDescription: Generate brand-mood scenes for skincare, makeup, and haircare across every shade variant. Built for indie beauty brands selling DTC.
cosmetics.heroTitle: Premium-campaign beauty photos for every shade
cosmetics.heroSubtitle: Skincare, makeup, haircare — staged in consistent brand-mood scenes. Build a full PDP and ad set without booking a single shoot.
cosmetics.problemBullet2: Stock photos look generic; competitors use the same ones
cosmetics.problemBullet3: Meta and TikTok demand fresh creative weekly
cosmetics.problemBullet4: Hand and skin retouching eats hours per asset
cosmetics.featuresSubtitle: Designed with founders, not enterprise procurement.
cosmetics.feature1Desc: Choose a vibe — clean & clinical, warm & natural, glossy & editorial — and stay on-brand across the catalog.
cosmetics.feature2Desc: Hands, faces, and backgrounds rendered with photo-grade accuracy. Critical for inclusive shade marketing.
cosmetics.feature3Desc: Same scene, same lighting, different shade. Your shade range looks like one campaign, not thirty disconnected shots.
cosmetics.feature4Desc: Square for marketplaces, vertical for Reels and TikTok, wide for hero banners — exported instantly.
cosmetics.useCaseTitle: What beauty teams ship with Luminify
cosmetics.useCase1: PDP hero shots for shade variants
cosmetics.useCase3: Routine and ritual scenes for editorial
cosmetics.faq1Q: Will my product packaging stay accurate?
cosmetics.faq1A: Yes — your packshot is the input. Bottle shape, label, and color are preserved; only the surrounding scene is generated.
cosmetics.faq2Q: How realistic are the hands and skin?
cosmetics.faq2A: Skin and hand rendering is one of our highest-priority quality bars. We tune specifically for beauty product placement.
cosmetics.faq3Q: Can I match the same scene across all my shades?
cosmetics.faq3A: Yes. Lock the scene template once, swap each variant pack-shot, and ship a consistent shade range in minutes.
cosmetics.faq4Q: Does it work for haircare and tools?
cosmetics.faq4A: Yes — haircare bottles, hair tools, and ritual scenes are all supported under the same beauty workflow.
cosmetics.ctaTitle: Ready to ship beauty content at the pace your launches demand?
cosmetics.ctaSub: 3 free generations on signup. No credit card.

jewelry.metaTitle: AI jewelry photography for fine and demi-fine brands
jewelry.metaDescription: On-model placement for rings, earrings, necklaces, and bracelets. The jewelry-first AI tool — production-tested since 2026.
jewelry.heroTitle: Jewelry photographed on models — without a model
jewelry.heroSubtitle: Rings on hands, earrings on ears, necklaces on collarbones. Lookbook-grade scenes for fine, demi-fine, and fashion jewelry brands.
jewelry.problemBullet1: Hand and ear models cost $300+/hour and book out weeks ahead
jewelry.problemBullet2: Tiny pieces are hard to retouch and show in scale
jewelry.problemBullet3: Stock and competitor imagery floods Etsy and Instagram
jewelry.problemBullet4: Each new collection needs a fresh editorial shoot
jewelry.featuresSubtitle: We launched in jewelry — every detail is tuned for it.
jewelry.feature1Desc: Rings on fingers, earrings on ears, necklaces on collarbones, bracelets on wrists. Anatomically accurate placement, every time.
jewelry.feature2Desc: Editorial, lifestyle, and minimal scenes — from soft-lit studio to golden-hour outdoor. Stay on-brand across collections.
jewelry.feature3Desc: Optimized for the metals and stones DTC jewelry brands actually sell — gold-fill, sterling, lab-grown, and crystal.
jewelry.feature4Desc: Square for Etsy and Amazon, 4:5 for Instagram, 9:16 for Reels. One generation, every aspect ratio.
jewelry.useCaseTitle: What jewelry brands ship with Luminify
jewelry.useCase4: Etsy listing refresh and brand kits
jewelry.faq1Q: Will my piece stay accurate to the photo I uploaded?
jewelry.faq1A: Yes. Stone color, metal tone, setting, and proportions are preserved. The model and scene are what's generated.
jewelry.faq2Q: Does it work for engagement rings and fine jewelry?
jewelry.faq2A: Yes — fine jewelry was our launch category. Stone clarity and setting detail are preserved with high fidelity.
jewelry.faq3Q: Can I show scale (ring on a hand, earring on an ear)?
jewelry.faq3A: That's exactly what on-model placement is for. Our category-specific templates handle proportion automatically.
jewelry.faq4Q: Will the same model appear across my collection?
jewelry.faq4A: Yes. Lock a model and scene; swap pieces. Your collection looks like one cohesive lookbook.
jewelry.ctaTitle: Ready to shoot your collection without a studio?
jewelry.ctaSub: 3 free generations on signup. No credit card.

multiDevice.description: Desktop in the studio, phone on the warehouse floor — Luminify adapts to your workflow. Shoot a flat-lay, upload it, and publish before your coffee cools.

bgRemoverPage.metaTitle: Background Remover — Free AI Tool | Luminify
bgRemoverPage.metaDescription: Remove backgrounds from photos in seconds — right in your browser, no signup required. Free AI tool by Luminify.
bgRemoverPage.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo — AI will automatically remove the background in seconds. Works right in your browser, nothing to install.
bgRemoverPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
bgRemoverPage.feat1Title: Save time with AI background removal
bgRemoverPage.feat1Desc: Automatic background removal in 5 seconds instead of 10–15 minutes of manual editing in Photoshop. Process dozens of photos in minutes.
bgRemoverPage.feat2Desc: Update your entire product catalog in a single day. No need to hire a designer — AI handles any volume.
bgRemoverPage.feat3Desc: Products on white backgrounds sell better. Professional marketplace photos increase CTR by up to 40%.
bgRemoverPage.feat4Desc: No Photoshop or graphic design knowledge needed. Upload a phone photo — get studio-quality results.
bgRemoverPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Any phone or camera photo will work.
bgRemoverPage.step2Desc: The neural network automatically detects the object and precisely removes the background — even with complex edges and details.
bgRemoverPage.step3Desc: Download the image with a transparent background in PNG format. Ready for marketplaces, websites, or social media.
bgRemoverPage.otherToolsSub: A complete set of AI tools for content creation
bgRemoverPage.otherTool1Desc: AI places your product on a model and creates realistic lifestyle shots
bgRemoverPage.otherTool2Desc: Ready-made cards for marketplaces with backgrounds, text, and badges
bgRemoverPage.otherTool3Desc: Color correction, shadows, text, and graphics — all in one editor
bgRemoverPage.otherTool4Desc: Model library for different product categories
bgRemoverPage.otherTool5Desc: Process your entire catalog at once
bgRemoverPage.faqQ1: What is the best tool for removing backgrounds from product photos?
bgRemoverPage.faqA1: Luminify uses the ISNet neural network, specifically trained on product photography. It precisely isolates objects even on complex backgrounds — jewelry, fine details, semi-transparent elements.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ2: How does AI background removal work?
bgRemoverPage.faqA2: The neural network analyzes the image, detects the main object, and creates a mask. Then the background is replaced with a transparent layer. All processing happens locally in your browser — photos are never uploaded anywhere.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ3: Is there any quality loss when removing the background?
bgRemoverPage.faqA3: No. The tool works with the original image resolution. Results are saved in lossless PNG format.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ4: Is it free? Do I need to sign up?
bgRemoverPage.faqA4: Background removal is completely free and requires no registration. Everything works right in your browser — no server uploads.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ5: Can I replace the background after removing it?
bgRemoverPage.faqA5: Yes! In Luminify's full editor, you can choose a background color, gradient, photo, or keep it transparent. Aspect ratio and product size settings are also available.
bgRemoverPage.ctaTitle: Ready to speed up your content creation?
bgRemoverPage.ctaSubtitle: Try all Luminify tools — background removal, lifestyle photos, product cards, and more.

whiteBgPage.metaTitle: White Background for Photos — Free AI Tool | Luminify
whiteBgPage.metaDescription: Add a white background to your product photo in seconds — right in your browser. Perfect for marketplaces and catalogs.
whiteBgPage.heroTitle: Add a white background to your product photo
whiteBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically removes the background and replaces it with white or any other color. Perfect for marketplaces and catalogs.
whiteBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
whiteBgPage.block1Title: A clean backdrop for every product photo
whiteBgPage.block1Desc: A white background removes distractions and puts the focus on your product. Buyers see only your item — no clutter, no noise.
whiteBgPage.block2Desc: No photographer, lighting, or white backdrop needed. Take a photo on your phone — AI does the rest. Results look studio-quality.
whiteBgPage.block3Desc: Amazon, eBay, Shopify — all major platforms require white backgrounds for product photos. With Luminify, bring your catalog into compliance in minutes.
whiteBgPage.block4Title: White as a base for further editing
whiteBgPage.block4Desc: Use your white-background photo as a base: add shadows, change the background color, or create a product card in Luminify's editor.
whiteBgPage.howToTitle: How to add a white background to product photos
whiteBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in any format — JPG, PNG, WEBP. Even a phone photo with any background will work.
whiteBgPage.step2Title: AI replaces the background with white
whiteBgPage.step2Desc: The neural network automatically isolates your product and replaces the background with clean white. You can also choose any other color.
whiteBgPage.step3Desc: Download the result in PNG format. Ready to upload to marketplaces, catalogs, or social media.
whiteBgPage.faqQ1: How do I add a white background to a product photo?
whiteBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically removes the background and replaces it with white. The entire process takes seconds and works right in your browser.
whiteBgPage.faqQ2: What is the best tool for adding a white background?
whiteBgPage.faqA2: Luminify uses the ISNet neural network trained on product photography. It precisely isolates objects and creates a clean white background — even for fine details like jewelry.
whiteBgPage.faqQ3: Is a white background required for marketplace photos?
whiteBgPage.faqA3: Yes, most major marketplaces — Amazon, eBay, Shopify — require a white or light background for main product photos. This increases conversions and meets platform standards.
whiteBgPage.faqQ4: Will my product look flat on a white background?
whiteBgPage.faqA4: No. AI precisely preserves contours and product details. For extra depth, you can add shadows in Luminify's editor.
whiteBgPage.faqA5: Yes, adding a white background is completely free and requires no registration. Processing happens right in your browser — photos are never uploaded anywhere.

blurBgPage.metaTitle: Blur Background — Free AI Tool | Luminify
blurBgPage.metaDescription: Blur the background of your photo in seconds — AI detects the subject and creates a beautiful bokeh effect. Free, right in your browser.
blurBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically detects the subject in your photo and blurs the background — like a professional portrait lens. Adjust blur intensity with a slider.
blurBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
blurBgPage.block1Desc: AI precisely detects object boundaries and blurs only the background. Your product stays sharp while distracting details softly disappear — like shooting with a professional lens.
blurBgPage.block2Desc: Took a product photo in your kitchen or store? Background blur hides the clutter and makes the photo clean and attractive — no reshooting needed.
blurBgPage.block3Title: Professional photos without an expensive camera
blurBgPage.block3Desc: The bokeh effect usually requires a fast lens costing hundreds of dollars. With Luminify, you get the same result from a regular smartphone photo — for free.
blurBgPage.block4Desc: After blurring the background, you can add text, shadows, or move the product to a new background in Luminify's editor. Create a product card in just a few clicks.
blurBgPage.howToTitle: How to blur a photo background
blurBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a product photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Even a phone photo with any background will work.
blurBgPage.step2Desc: The neural network detects the subject, separates it from the background, and applies blur. Adjust the intensity with a slider — from light to strong.
blurBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format. Use it for Instagram, marketplaces, or your website.
blurBgPage.faqQ1: How do I blur the background of a photo?
blurBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically detects the subject and blurs the background. You can adjust blur intensity with a slider from 1 to 25 pixels. Everything works right in your browser in seconds.
blurBgPage.faqQ2: Do I need Photoshop to blur a background?
blurBgPage.faqA2: No. Luminify does everything automatically — no need to manually select objects or know graphic design software. Just upload a photo and choose the blur intensity.
blurBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need an expensive camera for the bokeh effect?
blurBgPage.faqA3: No. AI creates a realistic blurred background effect from any photo, including smartphone shots. The result looks like it was taken with a professional portrait lens.

toolsPage.metaDescription: Free tools for product photography: background removal, color replacement, blur, photo enhancement, and product card creation.
toolsPage.heroSubtitle: Create studio-quality product photos in seconds with AI. All tools work right in your browser.
toolsPage.catBgDesc: Remove, replace, and edit backgrounds on product photos — automatically and for free.
toolsPage.toolRemoveBgDesc: AI precisely detects the subject and removes the background in seconds. Get a transparent PNG.
toolsPage.toolWhiteBgDesc: Place your product on a clean white or any solid-color background — perfect for marketplaces.
toolsPage.toolBlurBgDesc: Create a bokeh effect — blur the background while keeping the product in focus. Adjust blur intensity.
toolsPage.toolChangeBgDesc: Replace the background with any color, gradient, or make it transparent. 12 presets + custom HEX.
toolsPage.toolAddBgDesc: Replace the background with an image from the gallery or upload your own. AI removes the old background and adds the new one.
toolsPage.catAiDesc: Prepare product photos for publishing: improve image quality or build a ready-made product card.
toolsPage.toolGenerateDesc: Upload your product and get a studio photo in any setting — AI generates a realistic scene.
toolsPage.toolUpscaleDesc: Upscale low-resolution product shots, recover texture, and export a cleaner high-resolution image in one step.
toolsPage.toolCardsDesc: Create a ready-made product card for Amazon, eBay, or Instagram in just a few clicks.

upscalePage.metaDescription: Enhance product photos online, make images clearer, upscale up to 4x, and download a ready-to-use result for catalogs, product pages, and marketplaces.
upscalePage.heroTitle: Make your product photo clearer and larger
upscalePage.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo, improve quality, and download the result right away. Great for catalogs, product cards, and marketplaces.
upscalePage.uploadTitle: Upload a product photo to enhance
upscalePage.uploadBody: Drop a JPG, PNG, WEBP, or HEIC file. We process the image and return a clearer high-resolution version.
upscalePage.dropHint: Or drag and drop an image here
upscalePage.panelSubtitle: Works best when the product is already clearly visible.
upscalePage.panelPoint1: Phone photos that need more clarity.
upscalePage.panelPoint2: Images for marketplaces, catalogs, and product cards.
upscalePage.panelPoint3: Photos that need a larger size without extra noise.
upscalePage.noImage: No photo handy? Try one of these
upscalePage.zoomHint: Press Esc to close this preview.
upscalePage.processingHint: We are preparing a clearer version of your image.
upscalePage.resultPlaceholder: Your enhanced image will appear here.
upscalePage.controlsSubtitle: Choose the scale and run it again if needed.
upscalePage.limitBoxBody: If the final image would be too large, the page will warn you early. For larger originals, 2x is usually the safer choice.
upscalePage.errorTitle: We could not finish the enhancement
upscalePage.tip1: Best results come from photos where the product is already in focus.
upscalePage.tip2: Use 2x for most tasks and 4x when you need a larger image.
upscalePage.tip3: Enhance the photo first, then continue to background or card tools.
upscalePage.errorRateLimited: Too many enhancement attempts from this connection. Please wait a bit before trying again.
upscalePage.errorFileTooLarge: This file is larger than the 10 MB upload limit. Compress it a little or use a smaller source image.
upscalePage.errorUnsupported: Please upload a valid JPG, PNG, WEBP, or HEIC image.
upscalePage.errorLimitMp: The final image would be too large. Switch to 2x or use a smaller original image.
upscalePage.errorLimitEdge: The final image would be too large. Use a smaller source image or lower scale.
upscalePage.errorQueueBusy: The image service is busy right now. Please wait a minute and try again.
upscalePage.errorProviderConfig: The enhancement service is not configured on the server right now.
upscalePage.errorProviderAuth: The image service rejected the request. Please try again a little later.
upscalePage.errorProviderRateLimit: The image service temporarily limited requests. Please retry in about a minute.
upscalePage.errorProviderBilling: The image service is temporarily unavailable because of a billing or credit issue.
upscalePage.errorProviderUnavailable: The image service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again a little later.
upscalePage.errorSharedImage: We could not open this image for enhancement. Please upload it manually.
upscalePage.feat1Desc: Helps make your product photo look cleaner and sharper.
upscalePage.feat2Desc: Great for marketplaces, catalogs, and promo images.
upscalePage.feat3Desc: Upload the photo, improve it, and move straight to the next step.
upscalePage.feat4Desc: Use it with phone photos or smaller catalog images.
upscalePage.howToTitle: How to upscale a product photo
upscalePage.step1Desc: Choose a product photo in JPG, PNG, WEBP, or HEIC.
upscalePage.step2Desc: Use 2x for most tasks. Pick 4x when you need a larger result.
upscalePage.step3Desc: Save the PNG and use it in your catalog, product card, or social post.
upscalePage.faqA1: It makes product photos clearer and helps increase image size. It works best with slightly soft or smaller photos.
upscalePage.faqA2: Use 2x for most tasks. Choose 4x when the original is small and you need a larger image.
upscalePage.faqQ3: Will it change the style of my product photo?
upscalePage.faqA3: No. It keeps the product and composition the same and only makes the image clearer.
upscalePage.faqA4: The page accepts JPG, PNG, WEBP, and HEIC uploads up to 10 MB. The enhanced result is returned as a PNG for consistent quality.
upscalePage.faqQ5: When should I use this page in my workflow?
upscalePage.faqA5: Use it at the start when the source image is small or not sharp enough. After that, move on to background editing or product cards.

addBgPage.metaTitle: Add Background to Photo — Free AI Tool | Luminify
addBgPage.metaDescription: Add a new background to your photo in seconds — choose from the gallery or upload your own. AI precisely separates the subject. Free, in your browser.
addBgPage.heroTitle: Add a new background to your photo
addBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically removes the old background and replaces it with your chosen image. Pick from preset backgrounds or upload your own.
addBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
addBgPage.block1Desc: The right background adds context, depth, and emotion. A marble surface, wooden table, or soft gradient — each background changes how the product is perceived and makes the photo more appealing.
addBgPage.block2Desc: A clean, thoughtful background helps the product take center stage. Buyers immediately focus on the product, not distracting details around it.
addBgPage.block3Desc: No need to learn Photoshop or hire a designer. Upload a photo, choose a background — and AI does the rest. The result looks like a professional studio shoot.
addBgPage.block4Title: Upload any image as a background
addBgPage.block4Desc: Beyond preset options, you can upload your own image as a background. An interior photo, fabric texture, or brand backdrop — it's your choice.
addBgPage.howToTitle: How to add a background to a photo
addBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. AI automatically removes the current background and prepares the subject.
addBgPage.step2Desc: Pick a color, gallery background, or upload your own image. Try different options — the result updates instantly.
addBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format. Use it for your catalog, social media, or marketplace.
addBgPage.faqQ1: How do I add a new background to a photo?
addBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically removes the current background. Then choose a new one: a solid color, gallery background, or upload your own image. Everything works in your browser.
addBgPage.faqQ2: Can I upload my own image as a background?
addBgPage.faqA2: Yes. Click 'Upload an image' in the Custom background section and select any file. The background automatically scales to fit your photo.
addBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need Photoshop to replace the background?
addBgPage.faqA3: No. Luminify does everything automatically — AI isolates the subject and places it on the new background. No graphic design skills required.
addBgPage.faqA4: JPG, PNG, and WEBP are supported for both the product photo and background image. The result is always saved as PNG.
addBgPage.faqQ5: What tasks is this tool good for?
addBgPage.faqA5: Product photos for marketplaces, social media posts, online store catalogs, and any task where you need to quickly change the background without a studio or photographer.

changeBgPage.metaTitle: Change Background Color — Free AI Tool | Luminify
changeBgPage.metaDescription: Replace the background of your photo in seconds — choose a color, gradient, or custom shade. AI precisely separates the subject. Free, right in your browser.
changeBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically detects the subject and replaces the background with your chosen color or gradient. Perfect for catalogs, marketplaces, and social media.
changeBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
changeBgPage.transparentHint: The background will be completely removed. Download a PNG with transparency or send the photo to create a product card or AI-generated image.
changeBgPage.block1Desc: Pick from 12 preset colors or enter your own HEX code. AI precisely separates the subject and replaces the background — no manual selection or Photoshop required.
changeBgPage.block2Desc: Smooth color transitions give product photos a premium, modern look. Choose from 8 ready-made gradients — from soft pastels to bold contrasts.
changeBgPage.block3Desc: All product photos on the same background — your catalog looks professional and polished. Use your brand color for instant recognition.
changeBgPage.block4Desc: Marketplaces require white or solid backgrounds? Prepare your photos in a couple of clicks — no studio or photographer needed.
changeBgPage.howToTitle: How to change photo background color
changeBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a product photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Any shot will work — even from a phone.
changeBgPage.step2Desc: Select a background color from the palette, enter a HEX code, or choose a ready-made gradient. AI instantly replaces the background.
changeBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format with its new background. Use it for your catalog, social media, or marketplace.
changeBgPage.faqQ1: How do I change the background color of a photo?
changeBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool, pick a color or gradient from the palette — AI automatically detects the subject and replaces the background. Everything works in your browser in seconds.
changeBgPage.faqQ2: Can I use a custom background color?
changeBgPage.faqA2: Yes. In addition to 12 preset colors and 8 gradients, you can enter any HEX code or pick a color from the color picker. This is great for using your brand colors.
changeBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need Photoshop to replace the background?
changeBgPage.faqA3: No. Luminify does everything automatically — AI isolates the subject and replaces the background for you. No graphic design skills required.
changeBgPage.faqA4: JPG, PNG, and WEBP formats are supported. The result is always saved as a high-quality PNG so the background looks perfect.
changeBgPage.faqQ5: Is this suitable for marketplace product photos?
changeBgPage.faqA5: Yes. The tool is perfect for preparing photos for Amazon, eBay, Etsy, and other platforms that require solid or white backgrounds.
